species: R1441C and G2019S LRRK2 knockin mice have distinct striatal molecular, physiological, and behavioral alterations
tissue: distinct striatal molecular, physiological, and behavioral alterations
cell_type: hypoexcitability in indirect-pathway striatal projection neurons
disease_state: LRRK2 mutations are closely associated with Parkinson’s disease (PD).

strain: All mice were maintained on the C57BL/6 (Jax 000664, RRID:IMSR_JAX:000664) background.
